hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p3001 = netstat -ano 2>$null | Select-String ':3001 '; $p5173 = netstat -ano 2>$null | Select-String ':5173 '; if (-not $p3001 -or -not $p5173) { Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoProfile -WindowStyle Hidden -Command cd C:\Users\nyj05\ongil; npm run dev' -WindowStyle Hidden }"
